stories.headline: April becomes 2026's worst hack month at $606M as Lazarus claims 95% of losses
stories.tldr: Crypto hacks crossed $606M in April across 12 incidents, with North Korea's Lazarus Group behind the Drift and KelpDAO breaches that drove 95% of losses.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Concentration of state-actor exploits reshapes DeFi threat models — every protocol now has to budget for nation-state adversaries, not just smart-contract bugs.
the_details: Lazarus drained $285M from Solana's Drift Protocol on April 1 and $292M from KelpDAO on April 18.
47 incidents YTD versus 28 in the same window of 2025 — attack frequency up 68% year-over-year.
Top DeFi lender saw $9B in outflows post-KelpDAO as users yanked liquidity from cross-chain venues.

stories.headline: Four central banks set rates this week as Robinhood, Galaxy earnings test crypto bid
stories.tldr: BoJ, Fed, ECB and BoE all decide policy this week alongside Q1 GDP, March PCE, and earnings from Robinhood and Galaxy that gauge crypto demand.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Synchronized central bank week is the year's heaviest macro lift — anything hawkish slams BTC's $80K ceiling and stalls the spring rally cold.
the_details: Fed decision lands midweek with the March PCE inflation print as the data anchor traders watch.
Robinhood and Galaxy Digital earnings will reveal April retail and institutional crypto flows.
WTI above $90 keeps inflation risk live, complicating any rate-cut guidance Powell offers.

stories.headline: SEC Chair Atkins to keynote Bitcoin 2026 Vegas as Clarity Act push hits the Senate
stories.tldr: SEC Chair Paul Atkins is slated to speak at Bitcoin 2026 in Las Vegas as 100+ crypto firms press the Senate Banking Committee to mark up the Clarity Act.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: A sitting SEC chair keynoting a Bitcoin conference signals just how far the agency's posture has flipped from the Gensler enforcement era.
the_details: Coinbase, Ripple and 100+ firms sent a joint letter urging Senate to move the market structure bill.
Atkins inherits the SEC-CFTC token taxonomy from the March 17 joint interpretive release.
Conference runs alongside FOMC week, splitting industry attention between regulation and rates.

stories.headline: Solana devs pick Falcon signatures to harden network against quantum attack
stories.tldr: Solana's two core dev teams Anza and Jump's Firedancer landed on Falcon, a lattice-based signature scheme, as the network's quantum-resistant migration path.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: First major L1 with a unified quantum migration plan — sets the engineering bar Bitcoin and Ethereum's slower-moving roadmaps will be measured against.
the_details: Falcon would replace the Ed25519 scheme that currently secures Solana account keys.
Plan slots in alongside Firedancer's throughput target of 1M TPS by end of 2026.
Live Alpenglow upgrade already cut block finality below 200ms ahead of the signature rollout.

stories.headline: The Block names Steve Chung CEO as Foresight Ventures pumps $10M into expansion
stories.tldr: Crypto media outlet The Block appointed Steve Chung as CEO alongside a fresh $10M raise from Foresight Ventures, with co-founder Larry Cermak shifting to President.
stories.why_it_matters: Why it matters: Capital flowing back into crypto-native media signals a renewed bet on attention infrastructure as the cycle's storytelling layer rebuilds.
the_details: Larry Cermak stays on as President, refocused on research and product after years as CEO.
$10M from Foresight Ventures funds The Block's next expansion phase across data and editorial.
Move follows years of consolidation in crypto media after the 2022-2023 attention contraction.
